generated_oml:
instance PhysicalSensorStream : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor stream generating continuous time‑series observations from the physical twin for calibration and monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance OperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalSensorStream
]

instance SensorTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series observations collected from the sensor stream, used for calibrating model parameters and running simulations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ParameterCalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEngine
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation storing dimensional and shape information; lacks dynamic behaviour."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance DynamicODEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic behavioural model expressed by differential equations capturing forces and motion."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model part of the system’s knowledge base."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance ParameterCalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that adjusts model parameters to best fit observed data, synchronising digital and physical models."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that runs real‑time simulation of current operating conditions using models and data."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that detects safety violations and fault alerts by comparing simulation outputs to live performance."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance OptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that computes optimised resource usage based on simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that monitors system metrics against safety and optimisation thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance SupervisoryControlEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that implements supervisory control decisions, adjusting the physical twin or prompting human operator."
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that calibrates model parameters based on observed data."
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs real‑time simulation of current operating conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeSimulationInsight, StateEstimationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that detects safety violations and issues fault alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that calculates optimised resource usage."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight, OptimizationRecommendedAction
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares simulation outputs to live performance and flags deviations."
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that implements supervisory control decisions, adjusting the physical twin or prompting human intervention."
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedAdjustmentAction, HumanInterventionAction
]

instance RealTimeSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time simulation output reproducing current operating conditions."
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of unmeasured variables derived from sensor data and dynamic models."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection alerts indicating safety violations or abnormal behaviour."
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization results for resource usage derived from simulation and optimisation algorithms."
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring report comparing simulated state against live sensor data to detect deviations."
]

instance CalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results of calibration showing updated model parameters and their confidence."
]

instance AutomatedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control adjustment applied to the physical twin to correct deviations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HumanInterventionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Prompt for human operator intervention in supervisory control decisions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OptimizationRecommendedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommended optimal resource usage adjustments derived from optimisation service."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Development phase: create abstract representations such as static CAD geometry models of the vehicle structure and dynamic models expressed by differential equations for behavior prediction. Representation types shift from static‑geometry CAD to ODE‑based dynamic simulation models as the system progresses toward deployment. Transition management is achieved by embedding the models into a digital twin framework, where calibration algorithms continuously update model parameters with real‑time telemetry collected from the physical twin. Lifecycle governance is exercised through continuous monitoring modules that apply fault detectors, supervisory controllers, state estimators, and optimizers to assess safety and performance; when violations are detected, automatic or human‑initiated interventions adjust the physical twin and propagate updated model parameters back into the twin."
]
